video_caption: Just because some people have it worse doesn’t mean my medical struggles are less important and that my emotions aren’t valid. Lyme disease is a horrible condition, it's not easy to treat (especially when gone untreated for far too long) and most people live with debilitating symptoms for the rest of their life. Of course I am thankful I don’t have something like cancer, but again, that doesn’t mean someone’s diagnosis of chronic illness should be downplayed. And yes believe it or not, I’ve received a PLETHORA of comments like this 🤦🏻‍♀️ #lymedisease #lymediseaseawareness #chroniclymedisease #chronicpain #chronicillness #chronicillnessawareness
